name: Noodles with Spicy Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh angel hair pasta or other very fresh noodles
2 tsp To 4 ts hot chili sauce-with garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles according to package directions.
2. Heat sesame oil in a wok or skillet and brown the pork.
3. Stir in ginger and garlic; sauté for 30 seconds, stirring.
4. Reduce heat and add chili sauce, soy sauce, sherry, and hoisin sauce; mix thoroughly.
5. Add chicken stock; raise heat and cook quickly to reduce liquid.
6. Remove from heat, stir in scallions, and mix with noodles.
7. Let stand, covered, for 30 minutes to blend flavors. Stir occasionally.
